rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts is unrelated to Educ. Code §28.0022, which governs instructional requirements and prohibitions in school curricula. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 28.0022. CERTAIN INSTRUCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS AND PROHIBITIONS.
_note: No conflict; the rule governs curriculum/instructional prohibitions, while the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts.
